verses.1: Listen, sons, to a father’s instruction.
verses.2: for I give you sound learning.
verses.3: For I was a son to my father,
verses.4: He taught me, and said to me:
verses.6: Don’t forsake her, and she will preserve you.
verses.8: Esteem her, and she will exalt you.
verses.9: She will give to your head a garland of grace.
verses.10: Listen, my son, and receive my sayings.
verses.11: I have taught you in the way of wisdom.
verses.12: When you go, your steps will not be hampered.
verses.14: Don’t enter into the path of the wicked.
verses.15: Avoid it, and don’t pass by it.
verses.16: For they don’t sleep unless they do evil.
verses.17: For they eat the bread of wickedness
verses.18: But the path of the righteous is like the dawning light
verses.19: The way of the wicked is like darkness.
verses.20: My son, attend to my words.
verses.21: Let them not depart from your eyes.
verses.22: For they are life to those who find them,
verses.23: Keep your heart with all diligence,
verses.24: Put away from yourself a perverse mouth.
verses.25: Let your eyes look straight ahead.
verses.26: Make the path of your feet level.
verses.27: Don’t turn to the right hand nor to the left.
